ground_truth.title: Hotel Etiquette 101: Do's and Don'ts for a Smooth Stay
ground_truth.author: ISMTeam
ground_truth.main_content: Checking into a hotel should feel exciting, not stressful. Regardless of why you're in Utah, a little kindness and consideration help make the stay easier for everyone. At First Choice Inn at the Swell, we see every small gesture counts, from a friendly hello at check-in to a thank you when you leave. Those moments are what turn an overnight stop into a stay you will remember. A smooth stay begins long before you walk through the lobby doors. Make your reservation early to lock in the room and dates you want. If you book online or through a third-party site, double-check the details so there are no surprises later. Please notify us of any special requests or changes to your arrival time as soon as possible, so we can prepare our staff accordingly. First impressions start in the lobby. Having your ID and payment handy makes check-in go faster, and a little patience goes a long way. Keep phone use discreet and conversations at a low volume, as sound carries easily in open spaces. Respecting shared spaces and quiet hours ensures everyone in the hotel enjoys a comfortable stay. To keep the area safe and welcoming, please follow the posted guidelines. Shower before swimming, keep an eye on children, and use proper swim attire. These simple steps help ensure the pool stays clean and enjoyable for all of our guests. Most hotels expect guests to keep noise low between late evening and early morning, even if you don't see any quiet hours. Keep televisions at a low volume, avoid loud gatherings, and walk quietly in hallways. Good housekeeping etiquette helps keep your stay cleaner and more comfortable. Housekeeping staff should receive $1 to $5 per night, paid daily rather than at checkout. Think of your hotel room as being a guest in someone's home, but with professional hospitality standards. Use furniture, electronics, and linens with care, avoiding unnecessary rearrangement. Even the best hotels can hit a snag once in a while. What matters most is how it gets handled. If something isn't right during your stay, let our team know right away—we're here to help. Review your bill carefully and address any questions before leaving. Please complete checkout promptly to avoid delays for other guests. If your stay was enjoyable, please show your appreciation to the staff by leaving a thank-you note or writing a positive review. When you stay at First Choice Inn at the Swell, you'll love our comfortable and practical rooms. Each space includes blackout shades for a good night's rest, soft bedding, free Wi-Fi, and handy extras like a mini-fridge and microwave.
